hopper_clock.summary: A silent, reliable timer that uses two hoppers and a comparator to create a repeating pulse. Excellent for timing farms or other machines.
hopper_clock.use_case: Creating timed pulses for automated systems.

auto_smelter.summary: An automatic furnace system that uses hoppers to feed fuel and items into a furnace, and collect the output. A foundational automation project.
auto_smelter.use_case: Automatically smelting ores or cooking food without player intervention.
